posts.text:
Pete Hegseth wants to live in a world in which the US military can drop bombs on scores of children and face no serious media scrutiny for it. His vile claim that he can't wait for David Ellison to run CNN shows he pines for oligarchic control of media.

New from me:
newrepublic.com/article/2077...
zero loyalty to the US. what a traitor Trump is

Do not to treat serious matters of life and death like a sporting match or horse race. Presenting Trump with contradictions/binary choices can help expose his lies and incoherence. Do not turn him into a pundit; hold him accountable for his decisions.

if reporters listen to one another and follow up as McCreesh did, the result will make them all look better. It is inexcusable that Trump can avoid a hard question by insulting one reporter (especially women) and moving on.

the effing wheels are off the bus: Economy
Fourth-quarter GDP revised down to just 0.7% growth; January core inflation was 3.1%

It is not simply that Trump’s lies have become more obvious or that war coverage brings out the best in reporters (although both are true). Several factors explain this bonanza of quality journalism and indicate tougher reporting is transferable to other issues. open.substack.com/pub/contrari...
Good for him: "For that play to be associated with bombing human beings makes me sick,” Bell told The Washington Post. “I don’t want anything to do with images like that.”
and people die, families are separated, lives are ruined.
yet he pitched the war to Trump on exactly that. Regime change was never going to work. It isn't and we have a full scale diaster on our hands. www.wsj.com/world/middle...

the Pentagon has more than enough money to pay for the war for the foreseeable future thanks to the big, ugly bill that “provided an additional $153 billion for defense just eight months ago, on top of the annual defense budget of around $900 billion.” open.substack.com/pub/contrari...
There is a reason every other president refused Bibi’s invitation to start a regional war. Trump was the only one dumb enough to take the bait.
Do you think someone could explain to Trump this secret weapon to insulate us from energy price  shocks and weaken Iran’s grip on our markets? Clean. Energy. It is a national security thing
Kristi Noem's $220 Million Tax Heist ... imagine what he could do with the gavel in hand. What a difference a midterm can make open.substack.com/pub/contrari...

NEW: The Iranian drone strike that killed 6 U.S. troops in Kuwait at the start of the war was far more devastating than previously disclosed.

Dozens suffered traumatic brain injuries, burns, and shrapnel wounds. At least one required an amputation. More than 30 remain hospitalized. (CBS News)
Joe Rogan Says Trump’s Supporters Feel ‘Betrayed’ by Iran War.. no kidding. time to put pressure on CONGRESS (oh yes them, to end this) www.nytimes.com/2026/03/11/u...
